projects.name: DARts
projects.desc: Complete darts arcade scorer with 9 game modes — X01, Cricket, Around the Clock, Shanghai, Halve It, Bob's 27, Killer, Legs, Count Up. Installable PWA, Web Audio sound engine, no backend.

projects.name: Prewatchr
projects.desc: Chrome & Firefox extension that summarises YouTube videos before you open them. Press a shortcut, click any thumbnail, get a streaming AI summary in seconds. No backend needed for logged-in users.

projects.name: WalkTape
projects.desc: iOS app that turns your iPhone into an AR measuring tool — touch a point, walk a route, or raise it to a ceiling to get distances, path lengths, and heights, with exportable PDF plan reports.
